name: Adolphus Hailstork
abstract: Adolphus Cunningham Hailstork III (born April 17, 1941) is an American composer and educator. He was born in Rochester, New York, and grew up in Albany, New York, where he studied violin, piano, organ, and voice.

works_created.t: Epitaph (In Memoriam Martin Luther King, Jr.)

about_quotes.evidence: whom I always try to pull in on my particular opportunities, like for instance when we did the thing with the Akron Symphony... I suggested both Billy Childs and Bill Banfield, who constitute the rest of the recording.
